packageRules.description: Pin undici to 7.x — jsdom@29.0.1 imports undici internals removed in v8
Pin Node.js to 22 LTS — better-sqlite3 native rebuild fails on Node 24 with node-gyp ENOENT bug

Hold TypeScript below v7 — typescript-eslint@8.64.0 (latest, incl. canary) declares peerDependency typescript: >=4.8.4 <6.1.0 and crashes under TS7's rewritten internals (TypeError reading 'Cjs' in typescript-estree). Remove this pin once typescript-eslint ships TS7 support.
